strengths: Clear description of technical responsibilities and metrics (15% load speed improvement, 25% cost saving).
Relevant AWS certification demonstrating structured cloud knowledge.
Consistent use of standard full-stack development tools (React, Node, Express, SQL).
weaknesses: Resume feels slightly short and lacks deep project descriptions.
Limited leadership or cross-functional team exposure shown on the CV.
recruiter_comments: Alex has a good foundation and fits the profile of a dependable backend developer.
He communicates his achievements well with numbers, which is highly appreciated.
Consider for interview, but probe on system design depth and architectural decisions.
resume_improvement_suggestions: Add a second project to the resume to showcase versatility in frontend or database design.
Include a brief summary statement at the top of the resume highlighting core focus areas.
Provide more details on how infrastructure cost savings were achieved and validated.
priority_improvements: Add another high-quality personal project showing full-stack or architecture skills.
Include a professional summary highlighting experience with modern cloud environments.
Elaborate on database schema design and performance optimization achievements.
